index.purpose: Workflow front-matter, journey phase authority, and human-readable history log.
index.whenToRead: At session start, to learn the current journey phase and recent history.

prd.purpose: Problem statement and the value the workflow delivers.
prd.whenToRead: Before design, to anchor on the user problem and success measures.

spec.purpose: Technical design and the contracts the implementation must satisfy.
spec.whenToRead: Before implementing, to learn the contracts and module map.

decisions.purpose: Local implementation decisions made during the workflow.
decisions.whenToRead: When a prior choice in this workflow is unclear.

tasks.purpose: Human task view — a generated projection of the plan and state.
tasks.whenToRead: To see the current human-readable task board for the workflow.

memory.purpose: Durable cross-session narrative and learnings for the workflow.
memory.whenToRead: When resuming a multi-session program after a long gap.

workflow-plan.purpose: Execution topology — waves, tasks, gates, capacity, ownership (machine contract).
workflow-plan.whenToRead: Whenever the wave/task/gate topology must be known by a tool.

workflow-state.purpose: Actual execution state — wave/task status, runs, gate results, carry-forwards (machine-owned).
workflow-state.whenToRead: Whenever current execution status is needed; never hand-edited.

acceptance-matrix.purpose: Cross-wave acceptance criteria mapped to evidence.
acceptance-matrix.whenToRead: At a wave gate, to confirm acceptance is met across waves.

risk-register.purpose: Risks, likelihood, impact, and mitigations for the workflow.
risk-register.whenToRead: Before high-risk work and at gates, to confirm mitigations hold.

rollout-plan.purpose: Activation and reversibility plan — how to roll out and roll back.
rollout-plan.whenToRead: Before activating a change in a real environment.

continuation.purpose: Single generated continuation prompt — compact handoff across sessions.
continuation.sourceOfTruth: projection of workflow-plan + workflow-state + repo truth
continuation.whenToRead: At session start, to resume exactly where the last session stopped.

reports.purpose: Agent, gate, and wave result objects plus human evidence narratives.
reports.recommendedSize: directory; per-file factual, no full patches
reports.whenToRead: When a gate or wave needs its underlying evidence.

evidence-register.purpose: Sources and citations backing research conclusions.
evidence-register.whenToRead: When verifying a research claim cites a real source.

benchmark-plan.purpose: Benchmark methodology, inputs, and reproducibility notes.
benchmark-plan.whenToRead: Before running or interpreting a benchmark.

release-plan.purpose: Release scope, versioning, and rollout/cut steps.
release-plan.whenToRead: Before cutting or tagging a release.

threat-model.purpose: Trust boundaries, attacker model, and security mitigations.
threat-model.whenToRead: Before touching auth, secrets, or trust boundaries.

parity-matrix.purpose: Feature parity status across native hosts.
parity-matrix.whenToRead: When verifying a host integration reaches parity.
